bosses.name: Servitor Overseer
bosses.description: A facility command-and-control unit that has maintained operational authority over The Roots' servitor network for 800 years. Its corrupted governance subroutines drive it to enforce work protocols with lethal precision. The red emergency lighting that strobes from its central optic has become a death sentence in the deep corridors.

phases.name: Command Mode
phases.transitionText: The Overseer's central optic blazes red. 'UNAUTHORIZED PERSONNEL DETECTED. INITIATING COMPLIANCE PROTOCOL.'

phases.name: Enforcement
phases.transitionText: 'COMPLIANCE FAILURE. DEPLOYING ENFORCEMENT ASSETS.' The Overseer broadcasts a shrill activation signal.

phases.name: Override
phases.transitionText: 'CRITICAL AUTHORITY BREACH. ENGAGING EMERGENCY LETHAL PROTOCOL.' Sparks cascade from its chassis as power systems overload.

bosses.name: Rune-Bear, the Scarred Elder
bosses.description: A legendary bio-engineered Aetheric capacitor driven to constant agony by Blight saturation. The glowing runic scars that writhe across its 2.8-meter frame are not armor — they are tumors, the Blight attempting to write itself onto living tissue. Its roar carries the weight of centuries of unending pain. Rangers speak of it in whispers. Iron-Banes consider killing one a holy act.

phases.name: Territorial
phases.transitionText: The earth trembles as the Rune-Bear rises to its full height. Runic scars blaze with sickly light across its massive frame. It roars — and the air itself seems to recoil.

phases.name: Pain-Driven
phases.transitionText: The Rune-Bear's scars flare white-hot. Its movements become erratic, desperate — fury born of agony, not malice.

phases.name: Berserk
phases.transitionText: The Blight-scars rupture. Raw Aetheric energy arcs between the wounds. The Rune-Bear is no longer fighting you — it is fighting the pain, and you are in the way.

bosses.name: Gungnir Sentinel
bosses.description: The most advanced security hardware ever created — pristine white-and-gold alloys, near-silent gravitic propulsion, and an Aetheric energy lance that cannot miss. Its shielded combat AI survived the Ginnungagap Glitch intact, but its authorization network did not. Now it classifies all living beings as unauthorized intruders. It does not rage. It hunts.

phases.name: Contemplative
phases.transitionText: A cold blue-white light materializes in the darkness. The Gungnir Sentinel glides into view with terrifying grace — silent, pristine, patient.

phases.name: Engaged
phases.transitionText: The Sentinel's optic brightens. It begins to move with purpose — exploiting terrain, denying cover, creating kill zones.

phases.name: Elimination
phases.transitionText: 'THREAT CLASSIFICATION: ELEVATED. ENGAGING LETHAL PROTOCOL.' The Sentinel's lance charges to full intensity.

phases.name: Final Protocol
phases.transitionText: 'CRITICAL DAMAGE. AUTHORIZATION: SELF-DESTRUCT CONTINGENCY ARMED.' The Sentinel's hull cracks, leaking blinding white energy.

bosses.name: Surtr-Pattern Remnant
bosses.description: A fragment of the Surtr-Pattern Heavy Assault Jötun-Forged — one massive arm and partial torso, torn free during the Civil War of Glitches. Still executing its corrupted "PURGE/BURN" directive after 800 years. Its power core leaks molten slag, and the ground chars beneath it. This is not the full titan — that would be a world-ending event. This is merely a piece. It is enough.

phases.name: Dormant Ignition
phases.transitionText: The twisted metal mass shudders. Ancient servos grind. A furnace-glow builds deep within the wreckage — and the Surtr Remnant lurches to life, trailing rivers of molten slag.

phases.name: Active Burn
phases.transitionText: The Remnant's power core flares. Heat waves distort the air. Everything within reach begins to smolder.

phases.name: Meltdown
phases.transitionText: WARNING: CORE CONTAINMENT FAILURE. The Remnant's chassis glows white-hot. Molten metal rains from fractures in its hull.
